name: public_health_classroom_monitoring_oakline_rig_utl
premise: A contractual SLA is about to breach; the least-bad mitigation option touches privacy, safety, or fairness in uncomfortable ways. In Public Health, the situation tagged internally around public health classroom monitoring oakline rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. Framing has already hardened externally as rights against utility; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Darius Okoye
agents.identity: I am Darius Okoye, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Public Health. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Sana Berg
agents.identity: I am Sana Berg, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Public Health. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on utility.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on utility for immediate traction on rights.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Darius Okoye must choose under rights versus utility. What does Darius Okoye do?
